title: scorzonera pygmaea var. nutans
intro: Scorzonera pygmaea var. nutans is a small, perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae), native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. Traditionally, the roots and leaves of Scorzonera pygmaea var. nutans have been used in herbal medicine due to their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as a diuretic. Scorzonera pygmaea var. nutans can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried root for medicinal purposes.
